author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-decomp audit complete. 18 of 23 sklearn estimators present after wiring orphans (~78%). Big surprise: ferrolearn-decomp also hosts the 6 covariance estimators (EmpiricalCovariance, ShrunkCovariance, LedoitWolf, OAS, MinCovDet, EllipticEnvelope) — partially fulfills #252.

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #294 wired orphaned MiniBatchNMF + SparsePCA into lib.rs
- #295 inverse_transform on FittedIncrementalPCA / FittedTruncatedSVD / FittedNMF / FittedFactorAnalysis (FittedKernelPCA deferred — needs fit_inverse_transform flag)
- #298 proof-of-API integration test (19 tests)

Filed during audit (deferred):
- #296 GaussianRandomProjection + SparseRandomProjection + johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim (entire random_projection module — none present)
- #297 MiniBatchSparsePCA + module-level functions (dict_learning, dict_learning_online, fastica, non_negative_factorization, randomized_svd, sparse_encode)

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #90 MiniBatchDictionaryLearning
- #91 SparseCoder
- #222 trustworthiness (manifold metric)

Genuinely missing without an issue yet:
- KernelPCA inverse_transform with fit_inverse_transform flag

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- 6 covariance estimators living in this crate (sklearn keeps them in sklearn.covariance — partial fulfillment of #252)
- Umap (sklearn does not include UMAP; it's a third-party umap-learn)

Verification: 429 tests pass (370 unit + 19 api_proof + 2 oracle + 6 proptest + 2 sklearn_equiv + 30 doctest). Zero regressions.
